primary_accounting_issue: Hedge accounting for foreign exchange risk of intragroup dividend receivables in consolidated financial statements

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs define eligibility of hedged items, restricting hedge accounting to external transactions and providing an exception for intragroup monetary items.

These paragraphs require elimination of intragroup assets and liabilities in consolidated financial statements and set out the investment entity exception that exempts certain entities from presenting consolidated financial statements.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs establish reporting date alignment and profit attribution rules that affect the recognition of intragroup items in consolidated financial statements.
These paragraphs specify disclosure requirements for investment entities, supporting the distinct treatment of hedge accounting for intragroup items in investment entity consolidated statements.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs address cash flow classification and disclosures but do not determine hedge accounting eligibility for intragroup dividend FX risk.
These paragraphs address presentation and offsetting of financial instruments, not hedge accounting.
These paragraphs deal with disclosures about group composition and restrictions, not hedge accounting eligibility.
These paragraphs address eligibility for reduced disclosures, not relevant to hedge accounting.
These paragraphs address related party disclosures, not hedge accounting.
These paragraphs address non-cash distributions, not hedge accounting.
These paragraphs address separate financial statements, not hedge accounting in consolidation.
These paragraphs address hedges of net investments, not intragroup dividend receivables.
These paragraphs address tax status changes, not hedge accounting.
These paragraphs address members' shares, not hedge accounting.

treatment_families.family: Ineligible hedged items – intracompany transactions (no hedge accounting)
Eligible hedged items – intragroup monetary items (FX risk not fully eliminated)
Eligible hedged items – investment entity subsidiaries

approaches.label: Intragroup dividend hedge excluded
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.5 prohibits hedge accounting for intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements, and IFRS 10 paragraph B86 requires elimination of intragroup assets and liabilities.

approaches.label: Intragroup monetary item hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.6 allows hedge accounting for foreign exchange risk of intragroup monetary items when the FX gains/losses are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Investment entity hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.5 provides an exception for investment entities, and IFRS 10 paragraph 4B and IFRS 12 paragraphs 19A-19G permit hedge accounting for intragroup items measured at fair value through profit or loss.
